# OneClick Automations — Implementation Guide
# Generated by RITAC Command · May 29, 2026

## Step 1: App Settings
- App Name: `OneClick Automations`
- Description: `500+ SMB automation templates. One click. No code.`
- Status: Published ✅

## Step 2: Components to Create
### AuthGuard.jsx
Wrap all protected routes. Handles loading, unauthenticated redirect, and admin-only 403.
Source: .agents/memory/app-ui-wiring/universal-auth-gate-billing-portal.md

### PlanGate.jsx  
Wrap premium features. Shows upgrade prompt with correct tier name and upgrade URL.
Source: .agents/memory/app-ui-wiring/universal-auth-gate-billing-portal.md

### BillingPortalButton.jsx
Place on /billing page. Opens Stripe customer self-serve portal.
Source: .agents/memory/app-ui-wiring/universal-auth-gate-billing-portal.md

## Step 3: Route Classification
### Public (no auth)
See README for public routes for this app.

### Protected (AuthGuard required)
/dashboard
/installed
/settings
/billing

### Plan Gated (PlanGate required)
Install action after 2 installs (starter+)

## Step 4: Stripe Integration
Checkout: POST https://superagent-b2d614b7.base44.app/functions/createStripeCheckout
  body: { "app": "oneclickautomations", "plan": "plan_id_here" }

Billing Portal: POST https://superagent-b2d614b7.base44.app/functions/createBillingPortal
  body: { "app": "oneclickautomations" }
